equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: block_time-aware helpers exist, but the required payload and verification events are not emitted by the audited code paths.

checked_queries: block_time payload building start end verification
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The local port does not wire payload-building start/end or block-verification-end events that emit block_time from the block header; only EL head update is wired with block_time.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-metrics/src/block.rs defines helpers that emit block_time for payload build start/end and block verification end.
Search found no calls to log_payload_building_start, log_payload_building_end, or log_block_verify_end outside their definitions; payload_validator uses generic block phase logs without block_time.

notes: EL head updates preserve block_time, but the invariant requires more event types.
rationale: The primary diff adds block_time from block.timestamp(), renames payload logging arguments/fields from timestamp to block_time, and passes tip.timestamp() to log_el_update_head. The commit message states block_time should be used consistently across block lifecycle events. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Block lifecycle metric events for payload building start/end, block verification end, and EL head updates must emit block_time as the Unix timestamp from the relevant block header, and must not use the old generic timestamp field for that value.
suggested_falsification_tests: Capture block lifecycle tracing events for payload start, payload end, block verification end, and EL head update; assert each contains block_time equal to the block header timestamp and does not emit the old timestamp field for that same value.
summary: Block lifecycle block_time events are only partially wired.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Capture lifecycle tracing during payload build and block verification and assert start/end/verification events contain block_time; current calls are absent.
title: Block lifecycle events include block_time
